text_block_list.text:
Shortly after we set the Classics as 
Stay Gold's goal ——

In order to find Stay Gold's breakthrough 
method, I have been conducting research.
choice_data_list: (……Alright, that just about sums it up)

text_block_list.text:
I think Stay Gold should take a look at the 
resources I've gathered. Now, based on 
today's vibe, I think she's at ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——Fuu. That's a good looking blue…
choice_data_list: Nice, there you were

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohh～ It's Trainer. Did you also come to look at the sky?

I was able to find her rather quickly today. 
Despite my slow improvement, I find it 
becomes a lot easier if I make locating 
her my objective.
choice_data_list: I want to chat about the breakthrough

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh? …I guess I'll have to hear you out then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: So, were you able to grasp something?
choice_data_list: I tried putting it into a tangible form
I tried putting it into a tangible form

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Tangible…… Now that you mention it, 
we've only been talking about this 
"strength" we need to attain quite 
vaguely.

…To explain this to Stay Gold, I think we 
should both first be on the same page 
regarding the current races.
choice_data_list: How do you see the current racing trends?
How do you see the current racing trends?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Trends you say… One thing I noticed that 
has changed is that the general running 
speed has steadily gotten faster?

I nodded in agreement. As expected of Stay 
Gold. She may be aloof at times, but her 
observational skills are exceptional.

——Compared to past races, more have 
become aware of the emphasis of 
speed in recent years.

Despite racing the same distance, the 
clock of the past ticked sluggishly 
compared to the battles of speed 
current races have become.

And at the forefront of this need for speed 
is a horsegirl called Fuji Kiseki.

From her flexibility comes an instantaneous 
force, which ensures smooth acceleration. 
Then in the final spurt, she unleashes an 
explosive power conserved within her feet —

Her running had the potential to reform 
the races that were previously a battle 
for endurance into an endgame battle 
for speed ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——Fuji's running style, I'm not sure how 
to put it, but I can feel a certain affinity 
towards it.
choice_data_list: …! Is she in your memories perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Nah. In her case…… It's different from 
the connection I hold with Suzuka and 
the others.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's more like… the shape of our souls 
are similar, is that better or ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not really a feeling I understand 
much myself either.
choice_data_list: S-So it's like that too sometimes……
S-So it's like that too sometimes……

text_block_list.text:
Given Stay Gold's feeling of affinity to Fuji 
Kiseki, I feel much more confident in 
saying what I'm about to say.

Fuji Kiseki's rise in power in recent years 
signalled the appearance of more horsegirls 
who won through speed in the final spurt.

Whatever those horsegirls found within 
themselves, Stay Gold most likely can 
find it within herself too.

From what I can see, Stay Gold and Fuji 
Kiseki partially share the same style of 
running.

Which means, I think Stay Gold has the 
potential to attain the speed required to 
keep up in races ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so my running is similar to 
Fuji's, you say.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …………interesting.
choice_data_list: Based on that, we know what to work on

text_block_list.text:
From when high speed racing was established 
till now, the main component to win your next 
race was to precisely "maintain a buildup 
of speed".

While not lagging behind at the initial speedy 
pace, one must calmly maintain a certain 
acceleration, until the final leg to then 
explosively reaccelerate until the finish line.

Fully utilising the mind and body, a show of 
one's greatest speed, it's the power of "Fast 
and Tenacious Legs".

That precisely is, a power to surpass one's 
past, the greatness that Stay Gold should 
seize…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
"Fast and Tenacious Legs"…In order 
to fully reach my top potential speed, 
you're saying that I'll need stamina 
and strength in both mind and body.
choice_data_list: Speed is not the only important factor

text_block_list.text:
Being excessively speedy means that you 
could injure yourself. So if "speed" is a 
double-edged sword, then "tenacity" 
becomes the sheath to prevent injury.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So it can become the support for me to 
demonstrate my top speed… I see.
choice_data_list: So I'd like to adjust our training compass

text_block_list.text:
To obtain "tenacity", my current idea was 
that we should emphasise training on 
stamina and pace control.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I have no objections. It's what we need 
for our journey. I'll train as much as 
you need me to.
choice_data_list: Thank you…! I'll adjust as soon as I can!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Even so, "tenacity" huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. To train for this tenacity, I 
think I know just the person to ask ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Let's go meet them.
choice_data_list: Eh

text_block_list.text:
The next day, without a clue as to who 
we were going to visit, Stay Gold 
brought me to a certain estate ——
choice_data_list: Stego, don't tell me this is…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's one of the Mejiro family's villas.
choice_data_list: What so suddenly…!?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I say it already? To obtain tenacity, 
I knew just the person to ask.

Good grief. Why must you always be showing 
yourself so suddenly like this?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yo McQueen. Here, it's some melon candy that I thought was real good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my…!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
——A moment please, would you please 
refrain from suddenly offering me candy 
in hopes of distracting me!

I was surprised at the sudden appearance 
of a big name. Don't tell me the one Stay 
Gold was referring to all this time was 
actually…

——Meijiro McQueen. Boasting the 
prestigious name of the Mejiro Family, 
she is a first-class Stayer.
Not only was she the first in history to win successive victories in the longest G1 race, the Spring Tenno Sho, she is a star who has acquired plenty of achievements.

Due to her overwhelming strength in 
long distance races, she is renowned 
to be the strongest stayer in history.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——McQueen and I go well back as fellow 
tea time buddies. We meet up from time to 
time just like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You always suddenly appear, then aimlessly 
disappear again. That is quite the claim you 
are making, calling us friends.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohh, that's a tad harsh. You always looked so happy every time I brought sweets, I thought we were already friends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, I will personally thank you for 
bringing me such rare sweets then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, that does not mean that I 
approve of all your whims.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…For what reason do you show yourself 
this time?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in the Classics. Lend me 
your power, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
………You, even if you are completely 
fooling around, do not visit just to 
come bearing ill-willed lies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And it is precisely because I know you are 
like this, I must ask — Your words just now, 
is that your resolve?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm serious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…It appears even taking my position into 
account, your stance has not changed.

The position Meijiro McQueen speaks of 
is most likely of that as a member of the 
Meijro Family.

Of Stay Gold's generation, there are two 
Mejiro family horsegirls, Meijiro Bright and 
Meijiro Dober.

Let's say Meijiro McQueen decides to 
lend her power to an outsider, then it's 
obvious she would still have to prioritise 
those two ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…"Fast and Tenacious Legs" you say, 
and you tell me that you would like to 
use my running as reference in order 
to achieve that style of running.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I felt this from long ago but our 
running styles have great affinity.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…In order to run this long journey you 
have to be stubborn, and the shining 
example that comes to mind, it's you, 
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So please. I want you to take me along 
your run, and let's journey together until 
the very end.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let me show it to you. Your stride embedded 
in my races, your running in a new form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My run, in a new form ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
……Oh you, you are truly as honest 
as a child can be sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…Bright and Dober are bright children I 
am proud of, and I know their strong wills 
can lead them down their own paths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, as Ryan says, there exists a 
sense of reassurance in the two of them… 
No matter what challenge they face, they 
can definitely overcome it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ————Very well then, Stay Gold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This Meijiro McQueen will be at your service. 
However ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At this moment I will swear an oath, that 
running half-heartedly is absolutely 
unacceptable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then, may you show it to me, with this new 
strength in hand, the evolution of my run.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah …Look forward to it.

Just like this, Stay Gold obtained Meijiro 
McQueen's cooperation and made a 
promise to teach Stay Gold her running 
technique ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
First of all, in a few days, I want you to 
thoroughly witness my running form, 
and burn that form into your body.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hahah, looks like it's gonna get tough from 
now on, it's getting interesting now.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Hm? That girl there is?

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Pleased to meet you, Miss Stay Gold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She is a horsegirl with a connection to 
the Meijro family, I am currently taking 
care of her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of her future studies, she will 
be supporting us in our training. Do please 
acquaint yourself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ah I see. Let's get along from now Miss.

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
L-Looking forward to working with you. 
I will support you with everything I have.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright, then shall we get started, with our 
"Stealth McQueen Training".

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-Wait a moment —— What did you just 
say!? And with such a ridiculous name!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it cool? Kinda like some secret 
training regime.

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Fufu ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Now there, you finally laughed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on now, now is not the time to 
be relaxing…! It is about time to start so 
please be ready already!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Guh, amazing…! The only way is up from 
here huh…!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(If I can make this run mine, then I can go 
anywhere ————)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's heating up…!

On one hand, Stay Gold has been 
working hard on her special training 
with McQueen ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Servant
text_block_list.text:
As per Miss McQueen's request, please 
accept the delivery of her training 
records.

text_block_list.name: Meijiro Family Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If you were to have any questions, please 
ask so at any moment.
choice_data_list: Thank you very much! That was rather fast!

text_block_list.text:
By Meijiro McQueen's good graces, I was 
also able to share the Mejiro house's 
resources.
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)(I must make use of all this for our journey!)
$(scale 95)(I must make use of all this for our journey!)

text_block_list.text:
Heading towards a yet unbloomed spring, 
Stay Gold and I continued our endeavours 
to gain the strength we need to continue 
our journey…!
